rootCause: Playwright test constellations-quest.spec.ts created a quest using the built-in title "Map the Constellations", which now collides with the quest builder's duplicate-title validation. The test never stored a record in IndexedDB and failed waiting for quest creation.
resolution: Generate unique quest titles during the constellations quest e2e flow, update IndexedDB helpers to support string identifiers, and add coverage asserting duplicate titles stay blocked.
